title: The Voorhees law of traffic: when overtaken slow cars seem to always catch up at a red light
summary: UK researcher uses maths to explain seeming inevitability of phenomenon experienced by many motoristsIt is a situation experienced by many motorists: one driver overtakes another only to find the slower car is right behind them when they reach a red light.
